_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The market is likely to grind upward from Denial into Anxiety as stablecoin liquidity and structural bids offset retail panic, though divergences require humility.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes on UP direction, but split on conviction and phase mapping; the analyst's forward call was structurally illegal and has been corrected to the adjacent rung.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC breaks above $68K with funding staying below 0.01% and Fear & Greed climbing above 30
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC drops below $62K with VIX spiking above 22 and funding flipping negative
